hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */.claude/projects/*|*/.claude/memory/*) echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED — Hard Rule #1: Files are memory. All persistence lives in .md files tracked by git, not in ~/.claude/. Retry this write to the correct repo file (PROGRESS.md, TODO.md, PERSONA.md, or the relevant .md file)."}';; esac; }

SESSION_ID=$(jq -r '.session_id // empty'); SENTINEL="/tmp/.claude-fam-${SESSION_ID:-unknown}"; if [ -f "$SENTINEL" ]; then exit 0; fi; touch "$SENTINEL"; echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "STOP — Hard Rule #3: RECORD after every interaction. Before ending: 1) Update TODO.md with completed and new tasks. 2) Update PROGRESS.md with what was done. 3) Commit. No session ends without the RECORD step."}'
